title: StoredObject
description: Declarative logical StoredObject contract. StoredObject is logical, not physical, and does not imply project exposure or runtime authority.

object_ref.description: Stable logical identifier for the stored object.

object_kind.description: Usage classification only. It does not define storage location.

content_ref.description: Content-addressed blob reference when physical content exists. May be null for logical-only objects.

semantic.description: Future quad-eligible metadata. May be empty. This schema does not generate semantic quads or activate semantic runtime.

keywords.description: Keyword tag_ids. Keyword governance is semi-controlled unless the tag catalog states otherwise.

system_tags.description: Controlled system tag_ids. Free-form system tags are forbidden by policy.

usage_tags.description: Controlled usage tag_ids. Free-form usage tags are forbidden by policy.

technical.description: Technical metadata only. It is not quad-generating knowledge.

operational.description: Operational metadata only. It is not knowledge and does not grant authority.

derivation_capabilities.description: Declarative derivation capability hints. This schema does not open derivation runtime.

quad_flags.description: Future semantic-preparation flags only. This schema does not enable semantic runtime.
